name: Cui Juye

sections.short-biography: Sent to invade Zhuo commandry in 192 but failed, taking a heavy beating from Gongsun Zan.

full_text:
Cui Juye
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Juye. Sent to invade Zhuo commandry in 192 but failed, taking a heavy beating from Gongsun Zan. Cui Juye was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
